Notes.Text:
This update for xorg-x11-server fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2025-49175: Out-of-bounds access in X Rendering extension (Animated cursors) (bsc#1244082).
- CVE-2025-49176: Integer overflow in Big Requests Extension (bsc#1244084).
- CVE-2025-49178: Unprocessed client request via bytes to ignore (bsc#1244087).
- CVE-2025-49179: Integer overflow in X Record extension (bsc#1244089).
- CVE-2025-49180: Integer overflow in RandR extension (RRChangeProviderProperty) (bsc#1244090).
Notes.Title: Details

Relationships.RelatesToProductReference: SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5

Vulnerabilities.Description: A flaw was found in the X Rendering extension's handling of animated cursors. If a client provides no cursors, the server assumes at least one is present, leading to an out-of-bounds read and potential crash.

ProductID: SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-extra-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:xorg-x11-server-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:xorg-x11-server-extra-1.19.6-10.83.1

Vulnerabilities.Description: A flaw was found in the Big Requests extension. The request length is multiplied by 4 before checking against the maximum allowed size, potentially causing an integer overflow and bypassing the size check.

ProductID: SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-extra-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:xorg-x11-server-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:xorg-x11-server-extra-1.19.6-10.83.1

Vulnerabilities.Description: A flaw was found in the X server's request handling. Non-zero 'bytes to ignore' in a client's request can cause the server to skip processing another client's request, potentially leading to a denial of service.

ProductID: SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-extra-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:xorg-x11-server-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:xorg-x11-server-extra-1.19.6-10.83.1

Vulnerabilities.Description: A flaw was found in the X Record extension. The RecordSanityCheckRegisterClients function does not check for an integer overflow when computing request length, which allows a client to bypass length checks.

ProductID: SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-extra-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:xorg-x11-server-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:xorg-x11-server-extra-1.19.6-10.83.1

Vulnerabilities.Description: A flaw was found in the RandR extension, where the RRChangeProviderProperty function does not properly validate input. This issue leads to an integer overflow when computing the total size to allocate.

ProductID: SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-1.19.6-10.83.1
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:xorg-x11-server-extra-1.19.6-10.83.1
